tasks: Initial extension scaffold; added zone picker; added thumbnail and viewer UI.
Refined project/item handling; added release publishing workflow; switched to calver; added icons.
Designed and started extraction API; added Go server skeleton; defined extraction types; wired stub backend, extension calls, mock fallback, and provider interface.
Built hosted extraction provider and local/dev deployment assets; documented backend setup; fixed CORS and upstream error handling; added Ollama provider, streaming work, and related Go tests.
Set up dev server deployment under systemd and cloudflared; split homepage deploy workflow; built homepage/assets; codified tunnel routing and health checks.
Updated Grok-related config and hardened tunnel startup checks.

Worked on extension upload/deploy issues; planned Mothership persistence; added Postgres compose, migrations, generated queries, server DB wiring, web CRUD pages, share links, print styles, extension API/client integration, save/open flows, CORS proxying, and zone removal.

Redesigned share-link UX; fixed extension create errors and breadcrumbs; persisted share tokens; added Anthropic provider and OAuth docs; built unified project page, Google OAuth, project cards, schedule suggestions, notes, thumbnails, live reload, item image preservation, zone/sub-group support, updated_at triggers, dynamic schedule columns, and TypeScript data-bag support.

Split web package/template/static files; improved table layout and code column styling; added OAuth guards, sign-out, extension shared-session auth, popup sign-in flow, auth redirects, design tokens, Mothership UI overhaul, and auto-generated item codes.

Added dev VM deployment pipeline and self-hosted runner; fixed provider tests; updated extension/infra/CI config; added fonts/HTMX/tokens; overhauled UI with inline editing, quick-create, schedule redesign, footer, zone fixes, planning docs, and richer LLM project context.

Added always-on share link and copy toast; built note schedules, item reorder, CSV export, actions dropdown, mobile share cards, manual item entry, custom columns modal, custom-column extraction, confirmation panel, admin dashboard, uploads, HTMX item add, telemetry, shared projects, column reorder, provider hardening, extraction detail page, collaborators modal, item detail modal, code sorting, server-side PDF extraction, few-shot calibration, upload persistence, prompt/response logging, JSON colorizing, and schedule-switch code prefix updates.
Added backend switcher in panel header for development.
Improved auto-triggered new-schedule modal copy; fixed cancel behavior and host permissions for preset backends.
Fixed modal schedule creation so it no longer triggers cancel-auto-schedule behavior.

Added shared-project owner names, admin user management, magic-link auth, schedule reorder, item detail modal scrolling, image picker, API tokens, schedule-name deduping, Edit Columns modal, tests, and extension version bump.

Included shared projects in API project list; fixed Ollama config; added v0.2.1 zip script; improved About copy; homepage before/after animation; updated scaling cost report with real model names, cloud comparison, and founder compensation section.
New files from Fly.io Launch.
Fixed idempotency bugs in deploy-cloudflared.sh.
Renamed zone to room across DB/Go/templates; regenerated sqlc; stopped LLM bias toward current schedule; added paint-specific finish/color extraction; nav refactor and local-time formatting.
Panel: finish combobox swaps model SKU on variant pick.

Finish field as select combobox; canonical preset keys; mapping round-trip; Lightology swatch scrape; Ferguson Apollo state parsing; Anthropic prompt caching; contractor view with price/lead/stock columns; three-word human-friendly share link slugs; duplicate-item warning in review panel.
Duplicate-item warning: inline banner in review panel with server-side 409 check.
Notes column as textarea; site-wide UX pass with friendlier copy, DRY project header, About carousel; notes column wider with no line-clamp truncation.

Split page.html into per-page partials; fixed cell editing layout shift and room select width; contractor view read-only badge, schedule hover hints, preview thumbnails, grand total, thumbnail lightbox; 404 for forbidden routes; item detail shows all fields with floated image; user avatar menu replaces Sign-out button; skeleton loading screen in panel; bumped to v0.3.0; added versioned Store release CI workflow.
DXF export: project-level AutoCAD AC1015 download with MTEXT, all schedules stacked, and variable row heights.
